human_baseline.note: Estimated from Geirhos et al. 2023 and Rahmanzadehgervi et al. 2024
human_baseline.justification: Human visual perception maintains perceptual constancy under rotation, scale, illumination, and moderate blur. Estimated drops are primarily from extreme compression (Q10) and heavy occlusion.
